PREFER TRIP WITHIN SPORE-JPN RANGE
 
+++
 
MV VOSCO DEFENDER ( EX MV IVY BLUE )
55,885 MTDW ON 12.735 M SSW
PANAMA FLAG / BUILT 2011 IHI MARINE UNITED INC, JAPAN
CLASS LR
IMO NUMBER NO. 9419943
SDBC /GRABBER
LOA 190.00/BEAM 32.26 M - TPC 56.9 GT/NT 31,572/18,819
CUBIC CAP: 72,062 CBM GR / 67,062 CBM BALE
5 HOLDS/5 HATCHES - FOLDING TYPE HATCHCOVERS
GEAR: 4 X 30 MT ELECTRO HYDRAULIC CRANES - 4X30T SWL (HOOK OPERATION) / 24T
SWL (GRAB MODE) - FITTED WITH 4 X 12 CBM GRABS
PNI CLUB : WEST OF ENGLAND
AUSSIE HOLD LADDERS FITTED
 
SPD/CONS:
LADEN:     ABT 13.0 KNOTS ON ABT 29.6 MT/DAY OF IFO TTL PLUS ABT 0.1 MT
MDO/MGO
BALLAST:  ABT 14.0 KNOTS ON ABT 28.4 MT/DAY OF IFO TTL PLUS ABT 0.1 MT
MDO/MGO
 
PORT CONS:
IDLE ABT 2.4 MT/DAY IFO AND 0.1 MT/DAY MDO
WORKING ABT 4.8 MT/DAY IFO PLUS 0.1 MT/DAY
 
ECO SPD/CONS (WOG):
LADEN:  ABT 12.0 KNOTS ON ABT 23.8 MT IFO TTL PLUS ABT 0.1 MT MDO
BALLAST: ABT 12.5 KNOTS ON ABT 23.3 MT IFO TTL PLUS ABT 0.1 MT MDO
 
ALL DETS ABT
C/P SPEED & CONSUMTION UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITION, CALCULATED AS WHOLE
DAYS (FROM NOON TO NOON), UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND/OR
DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENT OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL.
DSS 3 TO MEAN WAVE A/O SWELL HEIGHT OF 1.25M OR LESS.
 
IF TRIM RESTRICTIONS IN PORTS AND VESSEL IS REQUIRED TO SAIL WITH LESS THAN
0.40M STERN TRIM, ADDITIONAL 0.5 MT/DAY TO LADEN CONSUMPTION AND 7%
ALLOWANCE ON SPEED (FOR ABOUT, I/O 5%).
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION APPLIES TO SDWT/CORRESPONDING DISPLACEMENT. IF SAILING
WITHIN TROPICAL ZONE AND SDWT IS EXCEEDED, ABOVE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION MAY
VARY.
IN SHALLOW WATERS - UNDER 2.5X OF VSL'S DRAFT SPEED/CONSUMPTION AFFECTED.
 
TANKTOP STRENGTH:          26.5 TON/M2
HATCHCOVER STRENGTH: 
HATCH NO. 1:  4.2 TON/M2
HATCH NO. 2-5: 3.5 TON/M2
 
DECK STRENGTH:
UPPER DECK BETWEEN HATCH NO. 1:         0.5 MT/M2
UPPER DECK BETWEEN HATCH NO. 2 - 4:  1.3 MT/M2
UPPER DECK BETWEEN HATCH NO. 5:         1.0 MT/M2
